author: Reformed Pick Me
title: Pretty Good
content: I love the addition of scrubbing to the app, although it could be adjusted to make scrubbing smoother. I get all my music offline easily, which literally took me months to look for. For some reason, though, recently, album covers for my music which I put on my computer have some weird color thing going on in the player and in the lock screen. It makes me feel like color blind. Pinks and purples show up where they're not supposed to be, and the quality of the album artwork is much poorer than it was initially. I wonder if it is due to the new update that made the album artworks smaller.
